title: Polylobium varium
taxonomy: Polylobium varium is classified as a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae. This family, also known as the milkwort family, comprises around 800 species of plants, mostly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Polylobium varium is native to Australia, where it is commonly found in dry forests and woodlands. The classification of Polylobium varium is further divided into its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its order, which is Fabales. The plant's classification reflects its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species within the Polygalaceae family.
